# RcTools

The goal of RcTools is to provide a collection of tools (functions) to
be utilised by the Northern Three Report Cards’ technical staff. These
tools bridge the gap between:

1.  Online data resources,
2.  Data analysis pipelines, and
3.  Publication ready figures and tables.

Specifically, the tools focus on tasks such as building commonly used
spatial files, downloading datasets from APIs, calculating scores and
grades, and producing stylised visual products such as plots, maps, and
formatted xlsx files.

A website is available to fully explore what this package has to offer:
[RcTools Website.](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/index.html)

# Getting Started

To install this package you will first need to download the [RTools
package](https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools/rtools45/rtools.html)
and install it on your computer (accept the defaults everywhere during
the installation process).

Following this, you can install the development version of RcTools from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("Northern-3/RcTools")
```

Finally, load the package just like you would any other R package:

``` r
library(RcTools)
```

Once you have successfully loaded the package you are good to go!

# Updating the Website

To update the website you will need to clone this repository as normal
and make your edits on your local machine. Before pushing your edits
back to the remote, run the following command:

``` r
usethis::use_pkgdown_github_pages()
```

This will update all of the necessary behind the scenes information for
the website to then be updated.

# Update the README

To update the readme (this document) you will need to clone this
repository as normal and make your edits on your local machine. Before
pushing your edits back to the remote, run the following command:

``` r
devtools::build_readme()
```

This will update all of the necessary behind the scenes information for
the readme to then be updated. Note that this is different to the normal
way of updating the readme.

# Creating/Editing Functions

Creating and editing functions takes a bit more work. Refer to [R
Packages 2nd Edition](https://r-pkgs.org/whole-game.html) to learn more.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`bind_letter_to_score()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/bind_letter_to_score.md)
  : Helper to Extract A Letter Grade From Scores
- [`build_basins()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/build_basins.md)
  : Build Basins in the Northern Three region
- [`build_land_sp()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/build_land_sp.md)
  : Apply Special Transformations to the n3_land Dataset
- [`build_marine_sp()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/build_marine_sp.md)
  : Apply Special Transformations to the n3_marine Dataset
- [`build_n3_region()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/build_n3_region.md)
  : Build the Northern Three Region Dataset
- [`build_named_islands()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/build_named_islands.md)
  : Build the Named Islands Within the Northern Three Region
- [`build_sub_basins()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/build_sub_basins.md)
  : Build the Sub Basins Within the Northern Three Region
- [`build_water_types()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/build_water_types.md)
  : Build the Landbased Water Types Within the Northern Three Region
- [`build_waterbodies()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/build_waterbodies.md)
  : Build the Marine Based Water Types Within the Northern Three Region
- [`build_waterbody_boundaries()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/build_waterbody_boundaries.md)
  : Build the Marine Zone Boundaries Within the Northern Three Region
- [`conditional_formatter()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/conditional_formatter.md)
  : A Helper That Presents Conditional Formatting Options
- [`define_colour_scheme()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/define_colour_scheme.md)
  : Helper to Select Various Colour Schemes
- [`dem_base_map()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/dem_base_map.md)
  : Create the base map elements for a DEM map
- [`dem_polygon_highlight()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/dem_polygon_highlight.md)
  : Highlight a specific area defined by a polygon
- [`dem_pre_processing()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/dem_pre_processing.md)
  : Preprocess Digital Elevation Model data from AUSSEABED for the GBR
- [`dem_water_overlay()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/dem_water_overlay.md)
  : Create a river overlay for the area
- [`ereefs_dotplot()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/ereefs_dotplot.md)
  : Plotting eReefs Data
- [`ereefs_get_date_range()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/ereefs_get_date_range.md)
  : Return the Model's Min and Max Dates
- [`ereefs_get_palette()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/ereefs_get_palette.md)
  : Return Colour Palettes Associated With Specific Variables
- [`ereefs_input_selection()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/ereefs_input_selection.md)
  : Provide a Range of Models to Choose From
- [`ereefs_list_safety_check_and_convert()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/ereefs_list_safety_check_and_convert.md)
  : Check if object is Stars or list of Stars, Convert if List
- [`ereefs_map()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/ereefs_map.md)
  : Mapping eReefs Data
- [`ereefs_reproject()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/ereefs_reproject.md)
  : Convert the eReefs object from curvilinear to a regular grid
- [`ereefs_windrose()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/ereefs_windrose.md)
  : Create a Windrose Plot from eReefs Data
- [`extract_air_temp()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/extract_air_temp.md)
  : Extract, Crop, and Combine Air Temperature Data
- [`extract_dhw()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/extract_dhw.md)
  : Extract Degree Heating Week Data from NOAA's API
- [`extract_ereefs()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/extract_ereefs.md)
  : Extracting eReefs Data
- [`extract_habitat()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/extract_habitat.md)
  : Extract Habitat Data from Datasets on File
- [`extract_land_use()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/extract_land_use.md)
  : Extract Land Use Data from a collection of Datasets on File
- [`extract_logger()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/extract_logger.md)
  : Extract AIMS MMP Logger Data
- [`extract_rainfall()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/extract_rainfall.md)
  : Extract Rainfall Data from BOM AWO API
- [`extract_sst()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/extract_sst.md)
  : Extract Sea Surface Temperature Data from NOAA's API
- [`extract_watercourses()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/extract_watercourses.md)
  : Extract Watercourses
- [`get_quarto_params()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/get_quarto_params.md)
  : Return the YAML params during an interative session
- [`maps_inset_layer()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/maps_inset_layer.md)
  : Create a Tmap Inset (corner) Map
- [`maps_water_layer()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/maps_water_layer.md)
  : Create a Tmap Water Layer
- [`name_cleaning()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/name_cleaning.md)
  : A Name Cleaning Function for N3 Tables
- [`nc_aggregation_helper()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/nc_aggregation_helper.md)
  : A function to help with various forms of netCDF aggregation
- [`nc_high_res_crop()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/nc_high_res_crop.md)
  : Crop A Raster and Increase its Resolution at the Same Time
- [`qld`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/qld.md) :
  Queensland State Border
- [`row_splitter()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/row_splitter.md)
  : Split a Table into N rows
- [`save_n3_table()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/save_n3_table.md)
  : Conditional Formatting with .xlsx Output
- [`score_to_grade()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/score_to_grade.md)
  : Function that converts scores to grades
- [`sf_change_over_time()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/sf_change_over_time.md)
  : Compare how a dataset changes over time
- [`value_to_score()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/value_to_score.md)
  : Function that converts values to score
- [`weight_score()`](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/reference/weight_score.md)
  : Function that weights scores based on predetermined weighting values

  Models](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/articles/Digital_Elevation_Models.md):

  Maps](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/articles/Mapping.md):

  Helpers](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/articles/Misc_Helpers.md):

  Scoring](https://northern-3.github.io/RcTools/articles/Report_Card_Scoring.md):
